calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Edward A. Nagy, Esq. for plaintiff David Strykowski, who is on telephone standby.
Michelle Nettesheim, Esq. for defendant Vladimir Lopoyan, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. Parties enter into a signed Stipulation Re: Dismissal/Judgment, which is then filed. Trial date vacated.

JPT: Andrew Westley, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (218)
